name: C&E Credit Solutions
description_short: C&E Credit Solutions is a credit repair provider based in Phoenix, Arizona. Rated 4.9/5 with 114 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
C&E Credit Solutions is a Phoenix, Arizona-based credit counseling and credit repair service that works with consumers looking to improve their credit profiles and overall financial standing. Operating locally out of the Phoenix metro area, the company appears to specialize in hands-on, personalized credit guidance rather than the automated, hands-off approach common among larger national firms. With a 4.9-star rating across 114 Google reviews, C&E Credit Solutions has built a notably strong local reputation for client satisfaction, suggesting a service model centered on direct communication and measurable outcomes.

As a credit counseling service, C&E Credit Solutions reportedly helps clients identify inaccuracies and negative items on their credit reports, dispute erroneous entries with the three major bureaus, and develop strategies to rebuild credit over time. The company's focus appears to be on a full-spectrum approach — addressing both the mechanics of credit reporting (disputes, removals, corrections) and the underlying financial behaviors that affect long-term credit health. Their local Phoenix presence likely means clients can expect more personalized engagement than they would receive from a large call-center-style credit repair chain.

Consumers considering C&E Credit Solutions should understand that legitimate credit repair is a process that takes time — typically several months or more — and no company can legally guarantee specific score increases or the removal of accurate negative information. Before enrolling, prospective clients should request a clear written contract outlining fees, the scope of services, and cancellation terms, as required under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA). It is also worth asking the company directly about their typical timelines and what specific actions they take on a client's behalf each month, so expectations are aligned from the start.

The company's near-perfect review score across a meaningful sample of clients is a genuine strength and sets it apart from many competitors in a category that has a historically mixed reputation. That said, strong reviews reflect client satisfaction rather than independently verified financial outcomes, and prospective customers should still perform their own due diligence. Pricing structure and service tiers have not been independently verified for this listing. Overall, C&E Credit Solutions appears to be a well-regarded local option for Phoenix-area residents seeking credit repair assistance, particularly those who prefer working with a smaller, community-oriented provider over a national brand.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptionally high Google rating of 4.9/5 across 114 reviews, indicating strong and consistent client satisfaction
Local Phoenix presence may enable more personalized service and direct communication compared to national chains
Categorized as a credit counseling service, suggesting a broader approach that may address financial habits alongside credit repair mechanics
Volume of reviews (114) provides a more statistically meaningful satisfaction signal than firms with only a handful of ratings
Small, local firm structure typically allows for more responsive customer service and direct access to decision-makers
cons: Pricing and fee structure are not publicly disclosed on the website, making upfront cost comparison difficult for consumers
As a smaller local firm, the company may have limited resources or staff capacity compared to larger national credit repair organizations
No independent third-party verification of credit outcome results or average score improvements reported
Service availability may be limited to Arizona residents or may not offer robust remote support for out-of-state clients
Limited public information about credentials, certifications, or staff qualifications makes it harder to assess expertise independently
best_for: Consumers in Phoenix, Arizona looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: C&E Credit Solutions appears best suited for Phoenix-area consumers who want a local, relationship-driven credit repair and counseling experience and are frustrated with impersonal national services. The main caveat is that prospective clients should request clear fee disclosures and written service agreements upfront, as pricing details are not readily available without direct contact.
services: Credit report review and analysis across all three major bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Dispute filing for inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable negative items
Credit counseling and personalized financial guidance
Debt management strategy and budgeting support
Goodwill letter writing and creditor negotiation assistance
Credit score monitoring and progress tracking
Credit-building plan development for long-term score improvement
Consultation services for consumers preparing to apply for a mortgage or auto loan
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
